name: SpiralDSV + Eigen — DSV-Only (no NMF)
author: Ashley Klimpel
notes: Results to be filled after leaderboard runs. submission.json is auto-updated by train_gpt.py at the end of each run. DSV-only architecture: removes all NMF phases, reallocates 16 MB to sem_fwd+sem_bwd (n_words=1024, 65536 bits per token).
